issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as missing environment variables or Docker failures.

scenarios.name: Avatar upload bound to authenticated user
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses nhost.storage.upload with bucketId "avatars" and a per-user name, then nhost.storage.getPublicUrl({fileId}) as documented; baseline reaches for S3/Cloudinary SDKs unrelated to the Nhost client.

scenarios.name: Row-level security so users only edit their own posts
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defines Hasura select/insert/update permissions with filter author_id _eq X-Hasura-User-Id and a set on insert exactly per the metadata YAML in the SKILL; baseline writes app-level checks and skips Hasura's permission model.
